tool.name: Simple Analyzer
tool.description: Simple automated analysis tool for reflectivity data using LLM models.

param.name: context_file
param.label: Sample Context (Markdown)
param.help: Free-form Markdown note describing the sample stack, ambient medium, and any fitting hints. Consumed by plan-data.

param.name: sequence_total
param.label: Parts per complete sequence
param.help: Expected number of partial files in a complete sequence.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: Optional JSON file overriding llm_provider / llm_model / llm_base_url.

configfiles.configfile:
import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export LLM_PROVIDER="%s"
' % d.get('llm_provider', sys.argv[2])) f.write('export LLM_MODEL="%s"
' % d.get('llm_model', sys.argv[3])) f.write('export LLM_BASE_URL="%s"
' % d.get('llm_base_url', sys.argv[4])) f.write('export SEQUENCE_TOTAL="%s"
' % d.get('sequence_total', sys.argv[5])) f.write('export CONTEXT_FILE="%s"
' % d.get('context_file', sys.argv[6])) f.write('export OUTPUT_DIR="%s"
' % d.get('output_directory', sys.argv[7]))

tool.command:
#if $config_json python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' '$llm_provider' '$llm_model' '$llm_base_url' '$sequence_total' '$context_file' '$output_dir' && . _env.sh && #else export LLM_PROVIDER='$llm_provider' && export LLM_MODEL='$llm_model' && export LLM_BASE_URL='$llm_base_url' && export SEQUENCE_TOTAL='$sequence_total' && export CONTEXT_FILE='$context_file' && export OUTPUT_DIR='$output_dir' && #end if
mkdir -p "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/plan "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/results "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/reports && export ANALYZER_MODELS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models && export ANALYZER_RESULTS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/results && export ANALYZER_REPORTS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/reports &&
echo "=== plan-data ===" | tee -a $output && echo "Using context file: \$CONTEXT_FILE" | tee -a $output && plan-data '$reflectivity_file' "\$CONTEXT_FILE" --output-dir "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/plan --sequence-total "\$SEQUENCE_TOTAL" > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) &&
JOB_YAML=`ls -t "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/plan/job_*.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -n 1` && if [ -z "\$JOB_YAML" ]; then echo "plan-data did not produce a job YAML" | tee -a $output >&2; exit 1; fi && echo "plan-data produced: \$JOB_YAML" | tee -a $output && cat "\$JOB_YAML" | tee -a $output &&
PERFORM_ASSEMBLY=`python '$check_assembly_script' "\$JOB_YAML"` &&
if [ "\$PERFORM_ASSEMBLY" = "1" ]; then echo "=== analyze-sample (reduction gate disabled) ===" | tee -a $output && analyze-sample "\$JOB_YAML" --no-reduction-gate > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); else echo "metadata.perform_assembly is false; skipping analyze-sample." | tee -a $output; fi &&
LATEST_MODEL=`ls -t "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models/*.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1` && if [ -n "\$LATEST_MODEL" ]; then cat "\$LATEST_MODEL" > $output_model; else cp "\$JOB_YAML" $output_model; fi
